name: tmscript-lsp-client
description: VS Code client for the TMScript language server

tmscriptLsp.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to launch the TMScript server. Leave empty to auto-detect a local venv first, then fallback to 'python'.

tmscriptLsp.serverRoot.description: Path to the server root folder that contains src/. Empty auto-detects workspace/server for development, then bundled extension server for published builds.

tmscriptLsp.serverModule.description: Python module to execute for the server (for example: src.main).

tmscriptLsp.trace.server.description: Traces communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync:server && npm run build
